name: A NORMAL, NON-GOONBAIT PvZ rpg
description:
This is it, the one, the ONLY true pvz rpg, while im not here to through shade but the amount of good non- bait pvz rpgs that also arent horror related are like, less than 3 or 4, so boom i did it myself, i hope ya like it i put quite a lot of effort into it and with the yapping done i'll present the starter msg rundown

1 day time

2 night time

3 day time POOL

4 NIGHT time pool

5 night time pool FOG

6 Roof

7 Zen garden (low cortisol)

Thats bout it, if ya want the zomboss fight lemme know and i'll try ta add it no promises tho

Oh also all of the plants from only pvz1 are here, and i gave the peashooters a lil extra and made it so they have fire variants as well as ice ones and yes threepeater can have all 3 (normal, ice, fire)

Fire art i found btw
creator: Deel_
